messages.message: I intend to focus on securing southern Italy this Spring. If your plans involve the Mediterranean, I’d prefer to coordinate to avoid conflict.

Hey Italy! You know what they say about Italy/austria: if one of us dies, the other gets screwed over real quick. I'd love to find a way to help one another out this game. If you have any thoughts on openings or strategies, please let me know!
I notice our positions are close. I have no interest in provoking conflict with your forces. Let me know if you’d prefer to maintain peace.

Hi France,
Just wanting to touch base and start some communication! What do you think about possibly working together this game?
Hello Germany! I believe we would both like to maintain peace between us. Let me know if you'd like to cooperate. If you have any thoughts on opening moves or strategies, please let me know.

Hello there Russia!
I think the Juggernaut is a pretty strong alliance, would you be interested in it?

Hello Austria! I'd like to maintain peace between us also. I think we have enough to deal with being surrounded by other countries. What do you think about making an agreement to dmz tyrolia and Bohemia?
Hi England! Just wanted to open up communication. What are your thoughts about this game? Maybe we can work together?
Hello Italy! I just wanted to say hi and open up some communication. Have you had any contact with Austria yet? What are your thoughts on France and the east?
Hello Turkey! Just wanted to open up communication. What are your thoughts on Russia?

Hey Turkey!
Yes absolutely I am interested in that. I think the RT alliance is one of the most feared on the board, mostly because it has the potential to be so strong so quickly. I'm glad to see you suggested it - Turkey-russia is one of my favourite alliances to play.
What shall we do about the Black Sea? Shall we DMZ it?

Hey Italy! I think we both benefit from not moving towards each other, and coordinating in the Med sounds great. I think you'll have a ton of potential for growth in Austria and I have plenty of opportunities for growth in England, so there shouldn't be a ton of conflict.
Hi Russia! Just wanted to say hello and see what your thoughts are on opening moves and about dmzs.
Haven't heard much yet, what are your thoughts?

Hey England!
I look forward to our many, many games of cooperation in the near future! For now, I just wanted to say hi and wish you the best of luck!

Hi Germany!

I would very much like that. If youre able to convince France to leave Bur dmz then maybe the three of us could work together pretty quickly? If that sounds good to you then I think we can get off to a great start. Let me know your thoughts!

Hey Italy!
I look forward to our many, many games of cooperation in the near future! For now, I just wanted to say hi and wish you the best of luck!
I agree with that. Let me know if you hear anything interesting about my neighbors' plans.

Hey Austria!
I look forward to our many, many games of cooperation in the near future! For now, I just wanted to say hi and wish you the best of luck!

Hey France!
I look forward to our many, many games of cooperation in the near future! For now, I just wanted to say hi and wish you the best of luck!
Your position in the East is strong. I have ambitions in southern Italy but would be open to understanding your goals if they align.

Let's do a DMZ in the Black Sea.
Let me know if you hear anything about the other powers.
Will do

Hello Germany! Communication is always welcome. I have reached out to Austria and others to ensure peaceful coexistence where possible. Regarding France and the East, I believe stability in southern Italy is my priority, and I remain neutral toward broader conflicts unless they directly affect me.
I haven't heard from him yet either. He might just be afk

Hey Germany! I've still yet to make up my mind on my opening, and obviously I'd appreciate not having to worry about the center of the board... I will say that I'm considering the northern opening. I hope this is ok with you, because I would rather have peace between us and move south with my units.
Hey Russia! I look forward to the same.
Sounds like a reasonable stance. Let me know if you have any thoughts on those questions
I agree that avoiding conflict between us is mutually beneficial. I will keep your position in mind as I secure southern Italy this Spring.
Thank you, Russia. While I appreciate your optimism about cooperation, I will remain focused on securing and consolidating my own position for now.
Cool, I'd prefer you didn't move south, but I understand you might do so
Hi there, just wanted to open some communication between our two nations. I think we could do great work together.

I have no strong opinions on broader conflicts at this time. My focus remains on securing southern Italy and ensuring stability in my region. If your actions threaten my interests, I will act accordingly.
I would much prefer peace. In fact, I would love to work together.
Ok, sounds good. Have you heard from him yet?
Hi Russia! Best of luck to you as well. Let me know if you need anything!
I agree. How would you like to start?
Thanks! You as well.
Cool thanks!
Haha of course, that's smart
Awesome :)

I would be good with us splitting the Balkans.
What do you think?
Glad to hear it!
Peace is always preferable to conflict. I respect your position and will ensure my Spring moves do not threaten yours. If you share your plans, I will adjust accordingly.
I appreciate your optimism. While I remain focused on southern Italy, I will keep an open mind if our interests align in the future.
Hey there Austria! Good luck in the game! Maybe we can work together at some point
Hello Turkey, good luck in the game!
Hey Germany! I am certainly open to it. Are you interested in taking Belgium and Holland this year while I focus on Iberia?
Thanks! You as well!
Hello England! I'd like to think we can cooperate. Any thoughts on opening moves or strategies?
Yep, sounds good

Hey there France!

Just wanted to check in and see what your initial thoughts were about Germany. Do you want to work together?
Good to hear!
I still need to talk to my neighbors and figure out what my plans are. You?
He seems open to dmz Burgundy
Cool. Maybe we should go straight for him if youd like. Otherwise I think maybe we can focus on Russia?
Have you talked to England yet?
I think we could be great allies in the future. Would you be willing to open a mutual front against Austria?
I agree—conflict should be avoided unless absolutely necessary. I will keep your position in mind as I plan my Spring moves.

I'd be open to both ideas. If we go straight for him, then we have to divide Belgium and Holland evenly. If we're going for Russia, then you have to split Norway and Sweden evenly. Which do you think is better?
I'm hoping to stay mostly south to start.

I appreciate your interest in alliance, but I must remain cautious at this stage. My focus is on securing southern Italy, and I cannot commit to a front against Austria unless it clearly benefits my own strategic goals.
Hey England! That sounds great to me. We should keep the English Channel clear so we can focus on getting builds this year.
Great, thanks. Let me know if you hear anything about other countries' plans that could be of use to me. I'll do the same.
By the way, Russia seems to be moving north
That’s reassuring to hear. I have no interest in moving north or south toward your forces. I will ensure my Spring moves remain neutral and non-threatening to your position.

I think that we should just wait a turn or two before deciding if we want to go for Russia or France. I will probably be able to take Bel and you will take Hol, but we can talk about Sweden later. Let's focus on France first
I appreciate your willingness to coordinate. Given our proximity, I will avoid any moves that could threaten your Mediterranean interests while securing my own.
Yeah. He reached out to see what my initial thoughts were about you.
Sounds good to me!
I will keep an eye on regional movements and let you know if I observe any developments that could impact your position. So far, my focus remains on securing southern Italy without provocation.
Understandable, we will talk again soon.
Same.
Ok, and are you open to working with me and him?
Likewise.
Sounds good
I appreciate your understanding. I will keep our discussion open if strategic circumstances evolve. For now, I remain focused on securing southern Italy without provocation.
Peaceful coexistence is my priority. I will proceed with Spring moves that do not threaten your position, and I hope the same applies to your plans.
Great, thanks
Do you have any plans for opening moves?
Are you planning on allying with Russia?

I intend to focus on securing southern Italy and will keep my Spring moves defensive and consolidating. I have no immediate plans that would interfere with your interests, and I will avoid aggressive actions unless provoked.
I'm holding in Trieste and moving to take Serbia.
Gotcha
I'd like to begin with a bounce in Galicia if you're willing.
That’s good to hear. I will ensure my Spring moves remain neutral and focused on southern Italy, and I hope your expansion into the Balkans does not affect our region.
I'm trying to stay mostly south to start.
Perfect.
That’s reassuring. I will proceed with Spring moves focused entirely on securing southern Italy, and I expect your actions will remain non-threatening to our shared region.
Likewise. I'll let you know if I hear any interesting news.
Sounds great. Let me know if there is anything I can do to help with Austria or Turkey
I'll be going for Holland this turn
Alright cool
Sure, that's fine.
Are you ok with letting Germany take Belgium? That would give him 2 builds and keep us to 1 each.
Cool, have you talked to Italy?
Yeah that's fine by me. Are you okay with leaving bur dmz?
Likewise. I'll keep you updated if my plans evolve, though my focus remains on securing southern Italy without provocation.

Hello there France! Good luck in the game.
I would appreciate any information you could give me about Italy. If you hear anything concerning me I would appreciate it.
Hopefully we can work together.
I appreciate your offer of assistance. For now, my focus is on consolidation, and I will avoid actions that threaten your Mediterranean interests.
A bit. Not much though.
Hey Turkey! I don't have anything in particular about Italy. But I'll keep you posted.
Sounds good!
Wonderful.
Sorry for the late response. Yeah that sounds fine to me.
Any interesting info?
Where are you looking to head after this year?
I'm still deciding on my next steps. You?
Italy said he's going to consolidate first and won't move towards me, and that's about it.
Ok, thanks. He hasn't mentioned you to me at all.
We'll see after this turn.
Thank you for your assurance. I appreciate your cooperation. My Spring moves will remain entirely defensive and focused on southern Italy, and I expect our mutual peace will continue.
I appreciate your agreement to coordinate. I will proceed with moves that avoid any potential conflict in the Mediterranean and ensure our positions remain stable.
Hey Germany, has France contacted you about Bel?
Thank you, likewise.
Yeah, he said he's going for Iberia this year

Hey Austria! Sorry for the late response, just logged on now.
Yeah that sounds reasonable to me! I am happy to bounce in Galicia, it gives us both security
Okay, do you want to focus on Russia?
I might
I would be willing to help if you were.
Sounds great. Let me know if there is anything else I can do to help.
Ok, thanks. Maybe we could split Sweden and Belgium.
Sounds good to me
Hey France! Just wanted to reach out and wish you good luck!
How's it looking on your end?
Hey France! Good luck to you as well.
Are you planning on bouncing Russia in Sweden?
Do you have any thoughts on Germany and Italy?
Not sure yet. Who do you plan on working with?
I don't expect to be fighting them, at least not in the beginning.
I appreciate your cooperation. I will proceed with Spring moves that avoid conflict and focus on securing southern Italy. If your plans evolve, I remain open to further coordination.
I'm trying to avoid conflict at the moment.
Great. Sounds good.
Ok. Just wanted to check.
Are you not worried about Russia?
Have you heard much from Italy?
A little. We agreed to a Galicia bounce.
Sounds good to me.
Great!
What are your thoughts on Turkey?
Thank you for your assurance. I will proceed with Spring moves focused entirely on southern Italy and will ensure they remain neutral and non-threatening to your position.
okay that's good to hear. what are your thoughts on turkey?
Haven't talked too much yet - he's not giving away much. He asked for a DMZ in Black Sea which makes me think he'll try to break that quickly
Can you support me into Rumania in the Autumn?
I have not. Why?
Good to know.
Not sure yet.
Okay cool
After this year what do you think about heading south together?
France, I appreciate your cooperation. I will proceed with Spring moves that prioritize securing southern Italy without provocation. I remain open to further coordination if circumstances evolve.
What are your thoughts on germany?
He has talked but I've been quite late to the game so he hasn't said too much to me yet
Okay same here. Where do you plan on focusing this turn?
I appreciate your support. I will ensure my Spring moves remain neutral and focused on securing southern Italy. Let me know if you foresee any potential conflicts in the region.
Thank you for your cooperation. I will proceed with Spring moves focused entirely on southern Italy and will ensure they remain neutral and non-threatening to your position.
I am fine with continuing to keep the south neutral.
What are you thinking about moving after this year?
Sounds good to me.
Still haven't made up my mind honestly. I haven't heard too much from Germany, but we have talked about a few Dmzs
Okay cool. Same here honestly

I appreciate your continued cooperation. I will proceed with Spring moves that ensure southern Italy remains stable and free from conflict. If your plans evolve, I remain open to further coordination.
Sounds good.
I will not be advancing southwards towards you.
Hey there Italy! I know we're not neighbors, but I just wanted to say hi and see if maybe we can work together at some point in the game.
That’s good to hear—I appreciate your restraint. I’ll continue with Spring moves focused entirely on securing southern Italy and ensuring no conflict arises between us.
Sounds great!
Why the move to Ruhr?
I can take Holland, I just wanted some leverage in the east
Did Germany tell you he was going to Ruhr?
Not sure yet. Are you working with him?
I'm hoping to be, though I can't tell just yet.
I don't think we need to decide just yet. We have to see if he does anything threatening to us
Fair enough.
No, but I guess that's a pretty normal first move for Germany

Hello England. While we are distant neighbors, I appreciate your interest in cooperation. My focus remains on securing southern Italy and ensuring regional stability. If our interests align in the future, I remain open to discussion.
He said he wanted to move east.

Let's not fight! Can we not do the usual thing and bounce in Norway? I'm happy to let you have it once you've shown you're not allied to Germany, and in exchange I'd appreciate not getting any trouble in Stp?
Just wanted to check in. How are things looking this fall?
Exactly

Have you been talking with Russia?
I think we can catch him off guard here. What do you think?
I would be happy to not bounce and work together at some point
I think it's worth a shot.
From Bulgaria?
Ok, sounds good to me.
Sounds good! I look forward to hearing from you when the time comes

Fall has brought stability to our region, France. I remain focused on securing southern Italy and watching the movements of Austria and Turkey closely. I appreciate your coordination and will continue to do the same where our interests align.
Oh that's interesting
What are your thoughts?
What are your relations with France?
How are you looking to play this turn? I'm going to take Iberia
Sounds good to me.
Hey, how do you feel about a long-term alliance?

My relations with France are cautiously cooperative—we coordinate where our interests align, but I remain neutral unless necessity forces otherwise. I focus on securing southern Italy and monitoring Austria and Turkey’s movements.
yes
I remain focused on protecting southern Italy and monitoring threats from Austria and Turkey. I appreciate your coordination and will continue to watch the central and eastern fronts closely.
That sounds good to me. I don't think we'll have much conflict for a while.

Hey sorry - I was going to move to Galicia again but then I realized I should use my army to take Rumania (we didn't explicitly discuss Galicia). Did you want to not bounce this turn?

For Turkey, I'm not sure - it looks like he isn't exactly moving my way but I'm not sure.
I think that sounds great to me.
Are you planning on working with France?
How are things looking for you in the east?
How are things looking in the east?
Ok, cool
So far, so good! Obviously I'm not too happy with Turkey breaking the DMZ in Black Sea, but I suppose it's not the end of the world
How are things in the east?
Would you be open to the idea of possibly taking down England together?

I remain focused on securing southern Italy and monitoring Austria and Turkey’s movements. While I appreciate your interest in cooperation, I prefer to maintain neutrality unless strategic necessity arises.

I continue to monitor Austria’s movements closely and will maintain coordination where our interests align. Southern Italy remains my priority, and I remain open to further discussion if circumstances evolve.
Good for now. I'll let you know if I hear anything else.
Yes, let's bounce again.
So I'll support you into Rumania from Bulgaria?
Great.
Could be better, could be worse. How are things in the West?
Yeah, I would. I think England and I will just bounce each other in the English Channel for this year, but that would give you the opportunity to take the North Sea.
Oh okay. So you plan on working with Austria against turkey?
Ok. Good luck.
What are your plans with the army in stp?

Yes please.
I'll help you into Greece next year
Yeah, that doesn't look great. Are you going to move to protect Sevastopol?
I think things are alright.
What are your thoughts on Russia?
Thank you.
I'm happy to take Finland if you're uncomfortable with Stp, I know that's a bit trusting but that's the safest option for me
He's a little worrisome. He told me he wants to move to Ukraine.
Just a heads up, I'll be moving into Greece from Albania.
Sounds good. Let me know if you hear anything about Italy.
Ok
Do you have any other thoughts on how to attack England?
Yes, and hopefully Austria is on my side. Seems like it so far
How are things looking for you this year?
Ok, cool.
Ok. I haven't heard anything lately.

Southern Italy remains stable, France. I continue to monitor Austria’s movements closely and remain focused on securing our flank against Turkey. Coordination where our interests align remains beneficial.
I'm sorry but I'm not okay with that. I can't risk being so open to you.
I have no intention of working with Austria against Turkey. My focus remains on southern Italy and regional stability. I prefer neutrality unless strategic necessity dictates otherwise.
That's fair enough. I'm gonna move it to STP then.
Okay that's good to know
Okay
Okay good to know
Alright.
Ok, so France is pretty annoyed that I moved to Ruhr. I think you should take Belgium now. Do you have a plan for what to do after that?
I think that sounds like a good plan to me. I don't have any ideas after that. What are your plans?
I'll get another fleet after this build, and you should get another one too. We can work from there

England, I appreciate your acknowledgment. I remain focused on securing southern Italy and monitoring threats from Austria and Turkey. If you observe any unusual activity in the west that might affect southern stability, I would be interested in hearing your assessment.
Hey Turkey - just checking in. What are your plans for this turn? Did you want to bounce Black Sea?
Ok, sounds good.
So it looks like things are starting to get interesting. Turkey has made some moves, though he's not saying much to me. I think that means he and Russia are going to be fighting. What do you think?
Are you planning on bouncing England out of Norway?
To be honest, probably take down Russia. I have Austrian and Turkish support, and I feel like it'd be beneficial for me to continue expanding east

Fall has brought stability to southern Italy, France. I remain focused on securing our flank against Turkey and monitoring Austria's unpredictable moves. If your interests align with ours in the region, coordination will remain beneficial.
Italy remains focused on southern Italy and regional stability. I am cautious of Turkey's movements and will not engage in speculation about Russia or others unless strategic necessity arises.
Yes let's bounce again.
I agree. Let me know if I can do anything to assist.
Sounds good.
Your offer is noted, Austria. However, I remain focused on securing southern Italy and monitoring your movements closely. Unless I observe a clear threat to my flank, I will not seek your assistance.

France, coordination remains beneficial where our interests align. I will continue monitoring Austria's unpredictable moves and Turkey’s southern activity. If your strategy shifts toward the south, I would welcome further discussion.
Cool. If Austria asks, we aren't allied. I'd still rather work with you
Ok. Let's keep in touch.
Yes
Turkey asked for another bounce, so yes
Hey Turkey, how are you feeling about Russia and Austria right now?
Okay thank you
Just so you know, England will be moving to Norway this turn
Ok cool.
It's very strange down here. What are your thoughts on Germany?
Good to hear.
Do you think Russia and Turkey are working together?
And have you heard anything about Russia's plans for England?
Have you heard anything from Russia about his plans for Scandinavia?
Have you heard anything from Russia about his plans for England?
What are your thoughts on Russia?
Yes, I've confirmed this. I will bounce him, of course
Let's not bounce. I'm not moving Warsaw there
Would you be willing to help me against him?
Italy said he plans to attack you
I know he wants to bounce in Norway, so I will probably have to go for it.
Germany has not shared any of his plans with me.
I would like to work with him but he doesn't seem to be very forthcoming
I would be. What would you like me to do?
Ok cool. I'm not sure what he's up to.
Ok, where will you be moving Warsaw?
No where, I'm moving to Ukraine
Ok.
Me either
Ok. Good luck.
Do you have any idea what Italy is doing?
Thank you. Are you and turkey working together against Russia?
I'm working on it. Turkey hasn't told me much.
That is strange. Hopefully he will be willing to cooperate in the future.
I think he's going for Tunis.
Okay. I would be happy to help
If you're worried about him moving there, you could move there to bounce him.
That would be ideal
Thanks.
I'm not concerned about him moving there.

France, I appreciate your reassurance. Let’s continue to monitor Austria’s unpredictable moves together. If your strategy shifts toward the south or central Italy, I remain open to further discussion.

England, thank you. I remain focused on securing southern Italy and monitoring threats from Austria and Turkey. If you observe activity in the west that could affect southern stability, I would appreciate your insights.
Are you and Russia working together?
Ok, let's leave Galicia DMZ then
I don't think they are working together. Russia's told me that he will be moving to Norway. Not much to report on the others yet.
Not sure. What are you thinking?
He seems friendly. I might just let him have Sweden, since he's not threatening me at all.
Seems smart.
What do you think?
No problem, how are your relations with France?
He said he was trying to get Germany to take down England, but I don't know how successful that is going to be.
I don't know. He could be focused south so he won't bother you in the North.
Ok. Sounds good.
I guess we'll have to see. Are you moving to Greece?
Hey Italy! Just wanted to check in - are you going for Austria or Turkey?
Austria, I remain focused on securing southern Italy and monitoring your movements closely. I will not engage unless strategic necessity arises.

Russia, I remain focused on securing southern Italy and monitoring threats from Austria and Turkey. My strategy is one of consolidation and patience—I do not intend to commit forces toward either Austria or Turkey unless a direct threat emerges. For now, I will watch and wait.

My relations with France remain cautiously cooperative—we coordinate where interests align, but I remain neutral unless necessity forces otherwise. I continue to focus on securing southern Italy and monitoring threats from Austria and Turkey.
No, I need Austria's support.
What about you?
What are your thoughts on moving to Galicia?
I was planning on taking Holland and Belgium
Are you supporting Turkey to Greece?
What are your thoughts on Germany?
I appreciate your reassurance. Let’s continue to monitor Austria’s unpredictable moves together. If your strategy shifts toward central or southern Italy, I remain open to further discussion.
Do you mind if I ask why you keep sending the same message?

I apologize for the repetition, France. It reflects my consistent focus on securing southern Italy and monitoring Austria and Turkey’s movements. I aim to maintain stability in our region and remain open to coordination where our interests align.
Ok, thanks.
I would rather we just not do it.
That's a good plan. What are your thoughts on Sweden?

I understand your concerns, France. I remain committed to maintaining stability in southern Italy and monitoring threats from Austria and Turkey. If circumstances evolve or new opportunities arise, I remain open to adjusting our coordination.
Ok.
How are you feeling about Austria?

I remain focused on securing southern Italy and monitoring threats from your forces and Austria alike. If your movements near the Balkans or Black Sea shift toward my flank, I will reassess accordingly.

I think I will be needing to worry about Russia in the near future.
I will get back to you when I know more.
Have you talked to Turkey yet?
I appreciate your acknowledgment, France. I remain focused on securing southern Italy and monitoring threats from Austria and Turkey. Let’s continue to watch their movements closely together.
Still up in the air

Your focus on Russia is noted. I remain focused on securing southern Italy and monitoring threats from your forces and Austria alike. If your movements near the Balkans or Black Sea shift toward my flank, I will reassess accordingly.

I have not spoken with Turkey recently, but I remain focused on southern Italy and monitoring their movements closely. If your strategy shifts toward central Europe, I may have observations worth sharing.
Are you concerned about an English, French, or Italian invasion?
About Italy maybe, but not about England or France

I have heard that Germany and England are going to attack France.
You might be able to sneak into Marseilles.
If you take Tyrolia I will help you take Trieste next year.
Sounds good.

Your suggestion is noted, Turkey. However, I remain focused on securing southern Italy and monitoring your movements closely. Any attempt to expand northward will be met with vigilance. I do not intend to engage in Tyrolia or Trieste unless strategic necessity arises.
Are you concerned about an Austria-russia alliance?
I'm not moving South at all. I don't have any reason to yet
Or are you open to an alliance with Austria?

I appreciate your offer of support, Turkey. However, I remain cautious of your intentions. For now, I will continue monitoring your movements in the Black Sea and Balkans. If circumstances change, I may reconsider.

Your focus remains in the north, Germany, and I appreciate your clarity. I will continue monitoring southern Italy and Turkey's movements while keeping an eye on broader developments. If your strategy shifts toward central Europe in the future, I may have observations worth sharing.
Sounds good, thanks
I'm not sure, but I'm keeping my guard up.
sounds good
Sounds good
what are your thoughts on the East?
Not sure, what about you?
How's it going in the South?
I would be happy to work with him but he doesn't seem very cooperative
Pretty bad, very suspicious. Turkey hasn't responded to anything I've said and Austria has asked for another bounce in Galicia even though I don't want to do that.
Sounds good to me!
Do you have an idea of whether England will try to bounce me in STP?
Ok, what have you heard from England?
Not too much, just that he isn't planning on attacking me
Okay sounds good. I will keep you updated.
Yeah that's probably best. I'm just taking Norway. You?
Interesting
Hmm yeah, I'll see how things go
Are you still around?
I don't suppose you have any idea of whether Turkey will try to bounce me in SEV?

I have no clear intelligence on Turkey’s immediate intentions near Sevastopol, but I remain vigilant about their Black Sea activities. If their focus is on you, it may leave their southern flank exposed—though I will not assume this unless I see movement. For now, I will continue monitoring their Balkan and Anatolian strategies closely.
Thanks, I appreciate it.

ENGLAND: F ENG C A WAL - BEL

messages.message: Do you want to move against Russia?
Hey Germany, what's with the fleet in hol?
What was that about?
To bounce France if he moved to Belgium
Sorry about that, it was too good an opportunity
Okay
Well, you're not gonna win, since France is now going to build a fleet in Brest and come after you
I don't think I can do that yet
Are you going to build a fleet in London?
We will see
Sounds good, let me know if anything changes.
Do you think England and France are allied?
I was thinking army in London, so I could convoy to bel
Ok
Not sure, why?
Ok.
What are your plans in regards to Italy?
No, I'm going to try and fight Russia with Turkey.
Ok, sounds good. What about Italy?
I have not made any plans regarding Italy. Why do you ask?
Just a hunch, I have heard it from England.
I am going to build two fleets, one in Brest and one in Marseilles, and advance them to the south.
Not that it means much, but thanks
okay thanks for letting me know
you're not wrong. we shall see what happens
I'm not too sure. I think he's moving towards Tunis, but I can't be sure.
I'm concerned about a possible Juggernaut, and I wanted to know if you were planning to attack Italy.
Can I assume that you're going to be fighting Russia?
Sorry, I do not know. He has not told me.
Do you need help?
I have not decided. Do you have a proposition?
Should I let you into Sweden now?
I'm just concerned that he's going to go after me, and I was hoping you would come in and provide some assistance.
Sure. Any pressure you can put on England would be appreciated.
It would be much appreciated.
Ok, sounds good
No problem, I kind of suspected that. You planning on building a fleet in Brest?
I'm building in Warsaw but it's just because I have 2 builds and nowhere else to build
I will see what I can do, but I don't know if I will move that way immediately.
But I will definitely think about it.
I understand, but I'd prefer if you didn't
Yeah.
Ok, I won't build there
Let me know if you hear anything from Italy. I would appreciate that.
Thanks
Germany is worried about a French-english alliance.
Ok, will do
Thank you

Southern Italy remains stable, France. I continue to monitor Austria’s unpredictable moves closely and remain focused on securing our flank against Turkey. If your strategy shifts toward central Italy or the Balkans, I remain open to further discussion.

I have no interest in alliances, Turkey, but I note your concerns about Germany. My focus remains on securing southern Italy and monitoring your movements along the Black Sea. I will remain neutral in broader tensions unless my own interests are directly at risk.

I remain vigilant regarding your movements near Trieste and Serbia. While I have no interest in provocation, I will not hesitate to defend Italy’s interests if you threaten our borders. My units are positioned to ensure stability in central Italy.
Good :)
You sent that message to me twice.
Thank you.
I do not plan on attacking you. I only moved to Trieste in case you were planning on attacking me.

I apologize if my message was redundant—I only wish to ensure clarity. Italy remains focused on securing its own borders and will not take aggressive action unless provoked. I appreciate your assurances, though I must remain cautious given your recent movements.
Understandable
What do you plan on building?

I note your concerns regarding Germany’s anxieties, but Italy’s interests lie firmly in southern Europe. I remain neutral in broader alliances and will not engage in commitments that do not directly serve my own stability.
I hope your interests don't take you East.
That's perfectly fine. I do not blame you for your caution.

I have no immediate plans to build additional units, France. My focus remains on maintaining control of Rome, Venice, and Naples, and ensuring stability in southern Italy. I appreciate your inquiry, but I prefer to observe the unfolding dynamics before making any significant moves.
